name: Sweet & Spicy Lentil Stew (Sue)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Potatoes, cut into small pieces (eighths)
1 Large Onion, cut into small pieces
1 cup Green peas, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin by cooking the rice.
2. Note: The spices are on the mild side.
3. Rinse and cook lentils and potatoes together for approximately 25-30 minutes. Drain and set aside. Use plenty of water when cooking the lentils. While the lentils are cooking, toast the garlic.
- Place the garlic in the corner of a heavy, non-stick pan.
- Add a few drops of olive oil or other good-flavored oil over it.
- Toss the garlic in the oil until coated and sauté until the garlic is toasted. This enhances the flavor and aroma of the food and kitchen.
4. Add the onions to the toasted garlic and sauté with stock or water until translucent.
5. Add chopped tomatoes. Make 1 cup of stock using a 2-cup measuring cup.
6. Add tomato paste to the stock and mix well.
7. Add spices, tamari, vinegar, honey, etc., to the mixture and blend.
8. Spice measurements are approximate and on the mild side. Add liquid to the sautéed onions.
9. Add stock or water as needed and continue simmering until all ingredients are combined.
10. When the lentil-potato mixture is cooked, drain it and mix into the saute.
11. Add green peas and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Optional: Add chickpeas or Bragg's liquid (if needed instead of salt).
